class.name: PlayFabPartyConfig
class.brief_description: Configuration for [PlayFabParty] initialization and network create/join.
class.description: Optional configuration for [method PlayFabParty.initialize_async], [method PlayFabParty.create_and_join_network_async], and [method PlayFabParty.join_network_async]. Chat-related fields are addon policy flags; they decide whether and how the addon creates and connects Party chat controls and are not native Party network settings.

members.member: Maximum number of players permitted in the Party network.
Direct peer connectivity policy. See [enum PlayFabParty.DirectPeerConnectivity].
Optional invitation id; the addon generates one if empty.
Whether the addon should create and connect a voice chat control.
Whether the addon should enable text chat on the chat control.
Whether the addon should enable speech-to-text transcription on the chat control.
Whether the addon should enable text translation on the chat control.
Audio input device id; uses the platform default when empty.
Audio output device id; uses the platform default when empty.
Title-supplied metadata stored alongside the Party network.
